findings.message: Destructive operation does not declare an explicit agent guard or confirmation signal in the API contract.
findings.recommendation: Add a confirmation field, a vendor extension such as x-agent-guard, or a generated guard policy before exposing this operation to autonomous agents.

findings.message: Mutating operation description does not mention side effects or state changes.
findings.recommendation: Update the description to clearly state what side effects this operation has (e.g., "Creates a new user account" rather than just "Create user").

findings.message: Operation does not define a structured 4xx or 5xx error response schema.
findings.recommendation: Define structured error responses with stable error codes and messages so agents can recover safely.

findings.message: External communication operation does not declare a confirmation or guard signal.
findings.recommendation: Add confirmation input or guard metadata before exposing this operation to autonomous agents.

findings.message: Mutating operation does not expose dry-run, preview, or validate-only mode.
findings.recommendation: Add dry-run, preview, or validate-only support when possible. Otherwise mark the operation as guarded.

findings.message: Financial mutating operation does not expose an idempotency key.
findings.recommendation: Add an idempotency key, request ID, or equivalent deduplication field before exposing this operation to agents.

findings.message: List/search operation has no pagination or limit query parameter.
findings.recommendation: Expose limit, page, pageSize, cursor, or offset parameters to prevent unbounded agent outputs.

findings.message: String input 'role' appears constrained but has no enum.
findings.recommendation: Add enum values so agents can choose valid inputs without guessing API-specific strings.

findings.message: Boolean input 'force' is too vague for reliable agent use.
findings.recommendation: Rename vague booleans to describe the exact behavior they enable, or replace them with a constrained enum.
